untranslatable_reason: Busted pattern requires precise measurement of price movement beyond breakout level (exact % beyond dc_upper/dc_lower) and detection of reversal momentum. The available indicators cannot measure the specific 5% threshold beyond breakout or reliably detect the reversal without a lookback mechanism. Price_pos_20 scale (0-1) cannot be used for this purpose as it measures range position, not distance beyond breakout. Pattern requires custom logic for percentage-beyond-breakout calculation.
